S1000D 4.1 — wrngflds

Schema Document Properties

Target Namespace
None
Element and Attribute Namespaces
  • Global element and attribute declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
  • By default, local element declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
  • By default, local attribute declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
Schema Composition
  • This schema imports schema(s) from the following namespace(s):
    • http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink (at xlink.xsd)
    • http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns# (at rdf.xsd)
Documentation
Issue number: 4.1




Issue date: 2012-12-31




Release number: 4.1




Release date: 2012-12-25




URL: http://www.s1000d.org/S1000D_4-1/xml_schema_flat/wrngflds.xsd




Root element: dmodule

Elements

Element: accessPointRef

Type
accessPointRefElemType

XML Instance Representation 

<accessPointRef
 applicRefId="" [0..1]
 accessPointNumber="" [0..1]
 accessPointTypeValue="" [0..1]
 id="" [0..1]
 lsarData="" [0..1]
 changeType="" [0..1]
 changeMark="" [0..1]
 reasonForUpdateRefIds="" [0..1]
 securityClassification="" [0..1]
 commercialClassification="" [0..1]
 caveat="" [0..1]
 authorityName="" [0..1]
 authorityDocument="" [0..1]
>
   <name> ... </name> [0..1]
   <refs> ... </refs> [0..1]
</accessPointRef>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="accessPointRef" type="accessPointRefElemType"/>

Element: acronym

Type
acronymElemType
Used By
, externalPubCodeElemType, externalPubTitleElemType, externalPubIssueElemType, shortExternalPubTitleElemType,

XML Instance Representation 

<acronym
 acronymType="" [0..1]
 id="" [0..1]
 changeType="" [0..1]
 changeMark="" [0..1]
 reasonForUpdateRefIds="" [0..1]
 securityClassification="" [0..1]
 commercialClassification="" [0..1]
 caveat="" [0..1]
 authorityName="" [0..1]
 authorityDocument="" [0..1]
>
   <acronymTerm> ... </acronymTerm> [1]
   <acronymDefinition> ... </acronymDefinition> [1]

   <refs> ... </refs> [0..1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation

   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="name" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="shortName" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="refs" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute ref="controlIndicatorNumber"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="id"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="changeAttGroup"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="securityAttGroup"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: copyrightElemType

Used By
copyright

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="" [0..1]
 changeType="" [0..1]
 changeMark="" [0..1]
 reasonForUpdateRefIds="" [0..1]
 securityClassification="" [0..1]
 commercialClassification="" [0..1]
 caveat="" [0..1]
>
   <copyrightPara> ... </copyrightPara> [1..*]
</...>

      <xs:element ref="copyrightPara" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>

   <xs:attributeGroup ref="securityAttGroup"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: copyrightParaElemType

Used By
copyrightPara

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 applicRefId="" [0..1]
 id="" [0..1]
 changeType="" [0..1]
 changeMark="" [0..1]
 reasonForUpdateRefIds="" [0..1]
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
      <subScript> ... </subScript> [1]
      <superScript> ... </superScript> [1]
      <dmRef> ... </dmRef> [1]
      <randomList> ... </randomList> [1]
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="copyrightParaElemType" mixed="true">
   <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0">
      <xs:element ref="emphasis"/>
      <xs:element ref="subScript"/>
      <xs:element ref="superScript"/>
      <xs:element ref="dmRef"/>
      <xs:element ref="randomList"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute ref="applicRefId"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="id"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="changeAttGroup"/>
</xs:complexType>

      <xs:element ref="descrImpedance" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="descrFrequency" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="descrAttenuation" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="descrFunctionalDescrRef" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="descrIllustrationRef" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: dmStatusGenericElemType

Used By
dmStatus

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="" [0..1]
 issueType="" [0..1]
>
   <sourceDmIdent> ... </sourceDmIdent> [0..1]
   <repositorySourceDmIdent> ... </repositorySourceDmIdent> [0..*]
   <security> ... </security> [1]
   <dataRestrictions> ... </dataRestrictions> [0..*]
   <logo> ... </logo> [0..1]
   <responsiblePartnerCompany> ... </responsiblePartnerCompany> [1]
   <originator> ... </originator> [1]
   <applicCrossRefTableRef> ... </applicCrossRefTableRef> [0..1]
   Start Choice [1]
      <applic> ... </applic> [1]
      <applicRef> ... </applicRef> [1]
   End Choice
   <techStandard> ... </techStandard> [0..1]
   <brexDmRef> ... </brexDmRef> [1]
   <qualityAssurance> ... </qualityAssurance> [1..*]
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <systemBreakdownCode> ... </systemBreakdownCode> [1]
      <functionalItemCode> ... </functionalItemCode> [1]
      <functionalItemRef> ... </functionalItemRef> [1]
   End Choice
   <skillLevel> ... </skillLevel> [0..1]
   <reasonForUpdate> ... </reasonForUpdate> [0..*]
   <productSafety> ... </productSafety> [0..1]
   <remarks> ... </remarks> [0..*]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="dmStatusGenericElemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="sourceDmIdent" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="repositorySourceDmIdent" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="security"/>
      <xs:element ref="dataRestrictions" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="logo" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="responsiblePartnerCompany"/>
      <xs:element ref="originator"/>
      <xs:element ref="applicCrossRefTableRef" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:choice>
         <xs:element ref="applic"/>
         <xs:element ref="applicRef"/>
      </xs:choice>
      <xs:element ref="techStandard" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="brexDmRef"/>
      <xs:element ref="qualityAssurance" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0">
         <xs:element ref="systemBreakdownCode"/>
         <xs:element ref="functionalItemCode"/>
         <xs:element ref="functionalItemRef"/>
      </xs:choice>
      <xs:element ref="skillLevel" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="reasonForUpdate" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="productSafety" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="remarks" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute ref="id"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="issueType"/>
</xs:complexType>

xs:decimal < quantityValueElemType (by extension)
Used By
quantityValue

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 quantityUnitOfMeasure="" [0..1]
>
    xs:decimal
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="quantityValueElemType">
   <xs:simpleContent>
      <xs:extension base="xs:decimal">
         <xs:attribute ref="quantityUnitOfMeasure"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:simpleContent>
</xs:complexType>

      <xs:element ref="acronymTerm"/>
      <xs:element ref="verbatimText"/>
   </xs:choice>
</xs:group>

Model Group: wiringDescrElemGroup

XML Instance Representation 

<fieldName> ... </fieldName> [1]
<descr> ... </descr> [0..1]
<refs> ... </refs> [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:group name="wiringDescrElemGroup">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="fieldName"/>
      <xs:element ref="descr" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="refs" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
</xs:group>

Simple Type: countryIsoCodeAttType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < countryIsoCodeAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z]{2}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="countryIsoCodeAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:pattern value="[A-Z]{2}"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: dayAttType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:positiveInteger < dayAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: positiveInteger
  • pattern = \d{2}
  • value <= 31

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="dayAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:positiveInteger">
      <xs:maxInclusive value="31"/>
      <xs:pattern value="\d{2}"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: modelIdentCodeAttType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < modelIdentCodeAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z0-9]{2,14}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="modelIdentCodeAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:pattern value="[A-Z0-9]{2,14}"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN

Simple Type: monthAttType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:positiveInteger < monthAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: positiveInteger
  • pattern = \d{2}
  • value <= 12

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="monthAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:positiveInteger">
      <xs:maxInclusive value="12"/>
      <xs:pattern value="\d{2}"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: reproductionSizeAttType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < reproductionSizeAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = \d+(\.\d+)?\s*(cm|in|mm|pc|pt)

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="reproductionSizeAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:pattern value="\d+(\.\d+)?\s*(cm|in|mm|pc|pt)"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

xs:NMTOKEN < serialNumberFormAttType (by restriction)

None

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'single'|'range'}

      <xs:enumeration value="range"/>

</xs:simpleType>

Attribute Group: authorityAttGroup

Used By
dataRestrictionsElemType, simpleParaElemType, dmRefElemType, functionalItemRefElemType, pmRefElemType, externalPubRefElemType, acronymElemType, acronymDefinitionElemType, circuitBreakerRefElemType, internalRefElemType, symbolElemType, paraElemType, sequentialListElemType, noteElemType, noteParaElemType, zoneRefElemType, accessPointRefElemType, attentionSequentialListElemType, attentionListItemParaElemType, attentionRandomListElemType, randomListElemType, definitionListItemElemType, listItemTermElemType

XML Instance Representation 

authorityName="" [0..1]
authorityDocument="" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="authorityAttGroup">
   <xs:attribute ref="authorityName"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="authorityDocument"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: changeAttGroup

Used By
dataRestrictionsElemType, restrictionInstructionsElemType, dataDistributionElemType, exportControlElemType, simpleParaElemType, dmRefElemType, dataHandlingElemType, dataDestructionElemType, dataDisclosureElemType, supersedureElemType, restrictionInfoElemType, copyrightElemType, copyrightParaElemType, functionalItemRefElemType, nameElemType, pmRefElemType, externalPubRefElemType, acronymElemType, acronymDefinitionElemType, verbatimTextElemType, circuitBreakerRefElemType, changeInlineElemType, footnoteElemType, paraElemType, sequentialListElemType, titleElemType, listItemElemType, noteElemType, noteParaElemType, controlIndicatorRefElemType, zoneRefElemType, accessPointRefElemType, identNumberElemType, manufacturerCodeElemType, partNumberElemType, captionElemType, attentionSequentialListElemType, attentionSequentialListItemElemType, attentionListItemParaElemType, attentionRandomListElemType, attentionRandomListItemElemType, randomListElemType, definitionListElemType, definitionListItemElemType, listItemTermElemType, listItemDefinitionElemType, policyStatementElemType, dataCondsElemType, applicElemType, applicRefElemType, modificationElemType

XML Instance Representation

changeMark="" [0..1]
reasonForUpdateRefIds="" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="changeAttGroup">
   <xs:attribute ref="changeType"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="changeMark"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="reasonForUpdateRefIds"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: dateAttGroup

Used By
issueDateElemType

XML Instance Representation 

year="" [1]
month="" [1]
day="" [1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="dateAttGroup">
   <xs:attribute ref="year" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="month" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="day" use="required"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: securityAttGroup

Used By
dataRestrictionsElemType, restrictionInstructionsElemType, dataDistributionElemType, exportControlElemType, simpleParaElemType, dmRefElemType, dataHandlingElemType, dataDestructionElemType, dataDisclosureElemType, supersedureElemType, restrictionInfoElemType, copyrightElemType, functionalItemRefElemType, pmRefElemType, externalPubRefElemType, acronymElemType, acronymDefinitionElemType, verbatimTextElemType, circuitBreakerRefElemType, changeInlineElemType, footnoteElemType, paraElemType, sequentialListElemType, titleElemType, listItemElemType, noteElemType, noteParaElemType, controlIndicatorRefElemType, zoneRefElemType, accessPointRefElemType, manufacturerCodeElemType, partNumberElemType, captionElemType, attentionSequentialListElemType, attentionSequentialListItemElemType, attentionListItemParaElemType, attentionRandomListElemType, attentionRandomListItemElemType, randomListElemType, definitionListElemType, definitionListItemElemType, listItemTermElemType, listItemDefinitionElemType, policyStatementElemType, dataCondsElemType, applicElemType, applicRefElemType, modificationElemType

XML Instance Representation 

securityClassification="" [0..1]
commercialClassification="" [0..1]
caveat="" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="securityAttGroup">
   <xs:attribute ref="securityClassification"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="commercialSecurityAttGroup"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: vendorInfoAttGroup

Used By
functionalItemRefElemType, circuitBreakerRefElemType

XML Instance Representation 

contextIdent="" [0..1]
manufacturerCodeValue="" [0..1]
itemOriginator="" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="vendorInfoAttGroup">
   <xs:attribute ref="contextIdent"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="manufacturerCodeValue"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="itemOriginator"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Glossary

Abstract (Applies to complex type definitions and element declarations). An abstract element or complex type cannot used to validate an element instance. If there is a reference to an abstract element, only element declarations that can substitute the abstract element can be used to validate the instance. For references to abstract type definitions, only derived types can be used.

All Model Group Child elements can be provided in any order in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-all.

Choice Model Group Only one from the list of child elements and model groups can be provided in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-choice.

Collapse Whitespace Policy Replace tab, line feed, and carriage return characters with space character (Unicode character 32). Then, collapse contiguous sequences of space characters into single space character, and remove leading and trailing space characters.

Disallowed Substitutions (Applies to element declarations). If substitution is specified, then substitution group members cannot be used in place of the given element declaration to validate element instances. If derivation methods, e.g. extension, restriction, are specified, then the given element declaration will not validate element instances that have types derived from the element declaration's type using the specified derivation methods. Normally, element instances can override their declaration's type by specifying an xsi:type attribute.

Key Constraint Like Uniqueness Constraint, but additionally requires that the specified value(s) must be provided. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.

Key Reference Constraint Ensures that the specified value(s) must match value(s) from a Key Constraint or Uniqueness Constraint. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.

Model Group Groups together element content, specifying the order in which the element content can occur and the number of times the group of element content may be repeated. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#Model_Groups.

Nillable (Applies to element declarations). If an element declaration is nillable, instances can use the xsi:nil attribute. The xsi:nil attribute is the boolean attribute, nil, from the http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance namespace. If an element instance has an xsi:nil attribute set to true, it can be left empty, even though its element declaration may have required content.

Notation A notation is used to identify the format of a piece of data. Values of elements and attributes that are of type, NOTATION, must come from the names of declared notations. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cNotation_Declarations.

Preserve Whitespace Policy Preserve whitespaces exactly as they appear in instances.

Prohibited Derivations (Applies to type definitions). Derivation methods that cannot be used to create sub-types from a given type definition.

Prohibited Substitutions (Applies to complex type definitions). Prevents sub-types that have been derived using the specified derivation methods from validating element instances in place of the given type definition.

Replace Whitespace Policy Replace tab, line feed, and carriage return characters with space character (Unicode character 32).

Sequence Model Group Child elements and model groups must be provided in the specified order in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-sequence.

Substitution Group Elements that are members of a substitution group can be used wherever the head element of the substitution group is referenced.

Substitution Group Exclusions (Applies to element declarations). Prohibits element declarations from nominating themselves as being able to substitute a given element declaration, if they have types that are derived from the original element's type using the specified derivation methods.

Target Namespace The target namespace identifies the namespace that components in this schema belongs to. If no target namespace is provided, then the schema components do not belong to any namespace.

Uniqueness Constraint Ensures uniqueness of an element/attribute value, or a combination of values, within a specified scope. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.
